hero.title: Kabapo
hero.subtitle: Organize your event with peace of mind, choose, and we'll call you back.

home.shops_subtitle: Explore a selection of talents ready to bring your event to life.
home.no_shops_desc: Come back soon to discover our new partners.
home.reviews_subtitle: Your trust is our greatest reward.
home.no_reviews: No reviews yet. Be the first!

footer.about_desc: Organize your event with peace of mind. Our team of experts is at your service to realize your events and help you achieve your goals.
footer.social_desc: Follow us on social media to stay updated with our latest news.

booking.title: Your Booking
booking.description: Follow the steps to complete your request.

event_step.title: What type of event are you organizing?
event_step.subtitle: Choose a category to get started.

details_step.title: Finalize your request
details_step.subtitle: This information will help us prepare your personalized quote.
details_step.summary_subtitle: Your request is built step by step.
details_step.error_missing_fields: Please complete all required fields marked with an asterisk before confirming
details_step.phone_hint: The country code is inserted automatically based on your choice.

confirmation.title: Last Step
confirmation.subtitle: Check your details and confirm to be called back.
confirmation.consent_desc: I agree that my number and email will be used by the Kabapo team to finalize my project.
confirmation.success_desc: Thank you for your trust. You can close this window, our team will contact you very soon.

auth.activation_required: Google or Email authentication is not enabled. REQUIRED ACTION: Go to Firebase Console > Authentication > Sign-in method and enable these providers.

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.intro_text: Welcome to Kabapo. By using our platform, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the application.
legal.service_desc_text: Kabapo is a marketplace connecting users (Clients) with independent event service providers.
legal.access_text: Registration is required for some features. Each user is responsible for their credentials. By creating a shop, a user agrees to change their role from 'Client' to 'Shop Admin'.
legal.client_obligations_text: Clients agree to provide accurate information and respect the provider's terms.
legal.ip_text: All Kabapo content is our exclusive property.
legal.liability_text: Kabapo is an intermediary and not responsible for disputes between Clients and Providers.
legal.privacy_collect_item1: Client Info: name, email, phone, booking details.
legal.privacy_use_text: Data is used to process bookings and communicate via email or WhatsApp.
legal.privacy_share_text: Data is shared with providers during a booking to enable service execution.
legal.privacy_rights_text: You can access, correct, or delete your data through your profile page.
